title: Tesla's China sales climb in the first two months of 2026 while BYD numbers drop
summary_full: Sales of Tesla's China-made electric vehicles rose in the first two months of 2026, from the year before, regaining lost ground to China's BYD.
summary_public: Sales of Tesla's China-made electric vehicles rose in the first two months of 2026, from the year before, regaining lost ground to China's BYD.
